mapper.select: SELECT SP.TBL_SO_P_ID as tblSoPId, SM.TBL_SO_M_ID as tblSoMId, SM.CMPY_CD as cmpyCd, SM.AGNT_CD as agntCd, AM.AGNT_NM as agntNm, SM.SO_TYPE as soType, SM.SO_NO as soNo, SM.DC_CD as dcCd, SP.PROD_CD as cprodCd, SP.PROD_CD as mtrlCd, SP.PROD_NM as cprodNm, SP.QTY as cqty, SP.QTY as qty, PM.MTO_YN as mtoYn FROM TBL_SO_P AS SP WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_SO_M AS SM WITH (NOLOCK) ON SP.TBL_SO_M_ID = SM.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M AS AM WITH (NOLOCK) ON SM.CMPY_CD = AM.CMPY_CD AND SM.AGNT_CD = AM.AGNT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M AS PM WITH (NOLOCK) ON SP.PROD_CD = PM.MTRL_CD AND SM.AGNT_CD = PM.AGNT_CD WHERE SP.TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblSoPId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN ) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{agntNm}, #{tblMtrlMId}, #{mtrlCd}, #{cprodNm}, #{processType}, #{currentQty}, -#{qty}, #{afterQty},
'택배출고-재고차감 (주문번호:' + #{soNo} + ', 송장번호:' + #{waybillNo} + ')'
'업체직출출고-재고차감 (주문번호:' + #{soNo} + ')'
, #{outboundDt}, GETDATE(), #{processUser}, GETDATE(), #{processUser}, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET COURIER_CD = #{courierCd}, COURIER_NM = #{courierNm}, WAYBILL_NO = #{waybillNo}, OUTBOUND_DT = #{outboundDt}, OUTBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser} WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblSoPId}

UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET COURIER_CD = NULL, COURIER_NM = '업체직출', WAYBILL_NO = NULL, OUTBOUND_DT = #{outboundDt}, OUTBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser} WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblSoPId}
